files.Title: Clippit.Core.PowerToolsBlock
files.Summary: Provides an elegant way of wrapping a set of invocations of the PowerTools in a using statement that demarcates those invocations as one "block" before and after which the strongly typed classes provided by the Open XML SDK can be used safely.

files.Title: Clippit.Core.RelationshipValidationError
files.Summary: Describes a single relationship validation error found in an OpenXml package.

files.Title: Clippit.Core.RelationshipValidator
files.Summary: Validates that every relationship ID referenced inside XML markup can be resolved to an actual relationship registered on that part.

files.Title: Clippit.Core.StronglyTypedBlock
files.Summary: Provides an elegant way of wrapping a set of invocations of the strongly typed classes provided by the Open XML SDK) in a using statement that demarcates those invokations as one "block" before and after which the PowerTools can be used safely.

files.Title: Clippit.Excel.CellDataType
files.Summary: Specifies the data type stored in a spreadsheet cell.

files.Title: Clippit.Excel.CellDfn
files.Summary: Defines a single cell value along with optional formatting and data-type metadata.

files.Title: Clippit.Excel.HorizontalCellAlignment
files.Summary: Specifies the horizontal alignment of cell content within a spreadsheet cell.

files.Title: Clippit.Excel.RowDfn
files.Summary: Defines a single row of cells in a worksheet.

files.Title: Clippit.Excel.WorkbookDfn
files.Summary: Defines the structure of an Excel workbook, serving as the root definition for spreadsheet generation.

files.Title: Clippit.Excel.WorksheetDfn
files.Summary: Defines the structure and content of a single worksheet within a workbook.
